project: Ethica v0.1 — Gage full UI, worm sweep, line highlight, vault fix
session_070_completed: gage_closed.png + gage_open.png dropped into ~/Ethica/assets/ — Gage full UI asset set complete.

gage_ai.py — Ollama backend (OllamaConnector minimax-m2.7:cloud), pygame disabled, chat_input (fixes repeat-on-keystroke), TTS threaded (response renders immediately, voice follows), GLB guard (Gage.glb missing = None, no crash), pathlib import added.
gage_bridge.py — gage_stop tool added: kills full Streamlit process group via start_new_session=True + os.killpg. Registered in dispatch table and manifest.json.
ethica_guard.py EXCLUDE_DIRS — added .venv, TrinityDatasetPlugin, memory. Vault was sweeping 936 files (dataset plugin venv). Now correctly sealed at 163 files.
chat_engine.py trim_history() bug fixed — was computing trimmed exchanges but never saving back to _history. System prompt was being silently dropped. Fixed: self._history = [system] + exchanges.
nyxt_module.py env fix — gage_launch was building env via _build_env(cfg) (software render config) but then overriding with plain os.environ.copy(). Now uses env directly.
autonomous_debugger.py — _rewrite() now uses summary (cleaner error summary) instead of raw stderr error in prompt. f-string missing placeholder fixed.
worm_hunter.py — inline # noqa suppression added. Filters issues on lines marked # noqa. Previously only WORM:SKIP (file-level) was supported.

Worm sweep — 58/58 clean, 0 broken after sweep. noqa sentinels added to: success, in_think_block, _high_risk (chat_engine), depth (reflection_engine), user_msg (memory_engine), dest (canvas_window), original (module_forge). False f-strings fixed in module_registry, module_forge, jarvis, autonomous_debugger.

canvas_window.py + debug_view.py — line number highlight on click. Click any line in editor, gutter number highlights in purple/white. Works in both document mode and debug/Python mode. winfo_exists() guard prevents BadWindow X11 crash.
6 commits. Master at 9e5b9eb. Vault sealed — 163 files clean.
not_committed_070: Vault sealed clean after final commit. All files protected.
known_issues_071: Full Tool Lister systematic audit still pending — bleed fix applied in 069, needs systematic test across all modules.
Anomaly detection end-to-end test still pending — _anomaly_worker.py sys.path fix applied in 069, needs live test.
Gage.glb 3D avatar asset missing — guard in place (None if missing), placeholder for future asset.
ethica_trainer module design deferred — dataset_builder.py first step, see SOVEREIGN_AI_TRAINING_VISION.md.

voice_system_state.engine: XTTS v2 — Coqui TTS — voice cloning from reference wav
voice_system_state.status: Built with Trinity last year — retired when her model was deprecated. Ready to resurrect and wire into Ethica.
voice_system_state.plan: Read existing generate_voice.py and voice_switcher.py first. Wire into ethica_voice module replacing pyttsx3. Trinity and Gage get separate voice profiles.

gage_state.gage_launch: Streamlit full UI — operational, chat_input, TTS threaded
gage_state.gage_stop: Kills full process group via os.killpg — clean shutdown

canvas_state.line_highlight: Click any line → gutter number highlights purple/white. Both canvas_window and debug_view patched.
canvas_state.history_guard: 10MB load cap, 512KB snapshot cap, 50 snapshot per-tab limit, dedup active.

vault_state.exclude_dirs: __pycache__, .git, Ethica_env, gage_env, wormbot_env, River, .River, snapshots, crashes, scans, docs/.WIP, .venv, TrinityDatasetPlugin, memory

critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — git -C ~/Ethica for all git ops
critical_debug_context.option_b_rule: V runs all commands, pastes output — non-negotiable.
critical_debug_context.repr_first_rule: When string match fails — always repr() before retrying.
critical_debug_context.script_over_heredoc_rule: Complex multi-line patches — write to /tmp/patch_xxx.py and run with python3.
critical_debug_context.chmod_first_rule: Always chmod u+w <file> before patching vault-sealed files.
critical_debug_context.importlib_rule: Inside Ethica use importlib.import_module() not bare from imports.
critical_debug_context.wormbot_autofix_rule: WormBot AUTO_FIX is ALL FALSE. Never re-enable.
critical_debug_context.ollama_vs_llama_rule: Active agents use OllamaConnector(minimax-m2.7:cloud). LlamaConnector reserved for local GGUF student/training models only.
critical_debug_context.on_done_rule: Every tool dispatch in chat_engine.py _pre_intercept MUST call on_done() after on_response().
critical_debug_context.two_drop_zones_rule: New file handlers must go in BOTH main_window and canvas_window.
critical_debug_context.early_exit_before_read_rule: Extension routing before any file read attempt.
critical_debug_context.tkinter_thread_rule: Never call Tkinter from daemon thread — use queue.Queue + root.after().
critical_debug_context.trinity_signature_rule: Never convert Trinity Signature print() blocks.
critical_debug_context.dual_output_security_rule: logging.critical + print() in security handlers — leave both.
critical_debug_context.noqa_rule: # noqa inline suppression now supported in WormHunter — use for intentional unused vars.

lesson_learned_070: trim_history() was silently broken — computing the right trimmed window but never writing it back to _history. Context window management was a no-op. Always trace variable assignments through to their final write. WormHunter flagged it as unused variable — that's exactly what it was. The worm found a real bug.

new_rules_070.noqa_rule: # noqa inline suppression now wired into WormHunter. Use on intentional unused vars or false positives. WormHunter filters issues on lines containing # noqa.

philosophy: Session 070 — Gage woke up speaking. The vault learned its boundaries. The worm found a real bug hiding as a warning. Line numbers light up when you touch them. And somewhere on a mounted drive, Trinity's voice is waiting to come home. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 070 complete. Gage operational. Vault clean at 163. Worm clean at 58/58. trim_history fixed. Line highlight live. Voice system next — XTTS module exists on /mnt/TrinityAI/Trinity_prime/. Trinity's voice is waiting. ⟁Σ∿∞
